notes: Three-phase session: (1) wave22 git merge + UAT planning, (2) W01 workflow narrative execution via Playwright MCP (~30 browser interactions, CronCreate for monitoring log), (3) next-morning frustration review + workflow process redesign. First observed test.uat-narrative session — Claude executes human-authored workflow narratives step-by-step using browser_click/fill_form/snapshot, distinct from automated E2E spec execution. Key failure: log wrote 20 identical 'no change' entries instead of human-readable summary grid. Produced 'stop and wait' protocol design for unattended agent runs. CronCreate+CronDelete lifecycle (create monitoring cron, delete after run) — only observed example. Session opens with near-compaction handover paste as context injection. Tools: mcp__playwright__browser_click x18, Bash x17, Edit x10, Read x10, mcp__playwright__browser_fill_form x8.
